nodes.label: Custom Tailwind color palette (bg, accent, bark, forest, blush…)
Custom Tailwind animations (float, marquee, meteor, border-beam…)
Custom font families (display, editorial, sans, brand)
public/favicon.svg (STEM brand favicon, purple lightning bolt)
Business rule: free delivery threshold (80 zł)
Business rule: delivery cost 9 zł (below threshold)
Payment methods: Card, BLIK, Bank transfer, Apple Pay
Nav links: Home, Shop, How it works, About
Mobile menu body scroll lock pattern
Cart item count badge with spring animation
Footer STEM watermark (oversized transparent brand text)
About page stats: 500+ customers, 2h delivery, 9-21 every day, 0% markup
Architecture decision: Tailwind-only styling (no CSS modules)
Architecture decision: Three animation layers (Framer Motion, GSAP, Tailwind keyframes)
Architecture decision: useInView once:true for scroll animations
Architecture decision: purely frontend, no backend/API calls
Architecture decision: clamp() for responsive font sizes without breakpoints
Architecture decision: prefers-reduced-motion respected in index.css
Semantic color palette: bg, bg-subtle, accent (sage green), accent-warm (terracotta), text-primary, text-secondary, surface, border, bark
Font pairing: Cormorant Garamond (display) + DM Sans (body)
SVG symbol set: bluesky, discord, documentation, github, social, x icons
Favicon: purple lightning bolt / energy bolt shape (brand identity)
Hero image: isometric 3D layered shapes (white top layer, purple-glowing bottom)

hyperedges.label: Three-layer animation strategy (Framer Motion + GSAP + Tailwind keyframes)
Cart data flow: products.ts → CartContext → CartDrawer/ProductCard
Design system: Tailwind custom tokens consumed by all section components
React provider tree wrapping the app (Toast → Cart → BrowserRouter)
Cart checkout flow: CartPage → CheckoutPage, both consuming CartContext and enforcing 80 zł free delivery rule
Navigation integrates cart context to show badge and open cart drawer
HomePage composes Hero, Pricing, Testimonials, EmailCapture sections
ShopPage reads products, parses prices with parsePrice, renders ProductCards
Three-layer animation architecture: Framer Motion (scroll entrance), GSAP (complex/counter), Tailwind keyframes (continuous loops)
STEM brand identity: favicon lightning bolt, oversized watermarks in footer and about, hero PNG
